events_to_add.title: TecnoMedic 2026 - International Medical Technology Congress
events_to_add.description: International medical technology congress connecting healthcare professionals with technology industry. Features 500+ suppliers expo, keynote conferences, B2B meetings, workshops, and networking events
events_to_add.location: Centro de Convenciones de San Luis Potosí, Boulevard Antonio Rocha Cordero 125

events_to_add.title: Yuri 'Icónica' Tour
events_to_add.description: Legendary Mexican pop singer Yuri brings her 'Icónica' tour to San Luis Potosí, celebrating a career spanning multiple generations with her powerful voice and iconic hits
events_to_add.location: Arena Potosí, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Banda MS Concert
events_to_add.description: Major regional Mexican music concert featuring Banda MS de Sergio Lizárraga, one of Mexico's most popular banda sinaloense groups
events_to_add.location: Arena Potosí, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: FEREVHI - Feria Regional de Villa Hidalgo
events_to_add.description: Traditional regional fair in Villa Hidalgo municipality featuring popular shows, live music, mechanical rides, agricultural exhibitions, and community celebrations
events_to_add.location: Villa Hidalgo, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: NASCAR México Series - San Luis Potosí
events_to_add.description: Stock car racing series at Autódromo Potosino. Part of Latin America's most important NASCAR championship
events_to_add.location: Autódromo Potosino, Km 237 San Luis Potosí-Rioverde highway

events_to_add.title: Juanes Concert
events_to_add.description: Colombian superstar Juanes performs at Teatro de la Ciudad with his catalogue of Latin rock hits including 'A Dios le Pido', 'La Camisa Negra', and 'Fotografía'. Multiple Grammy and Latin Grammy winner
events_to_add.location: Teatro de la Ciudad del Parque Tangamanga I, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: La Gran Fiesta del Mariachi
events_to_add.description: Grand celebration of mariachi music and Mexican charro tradition featuring top mariachi ensembles performing at the historic Lienzo Charro
events_to_add.location: Lienzo el Rancho del Charro SLP, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: El Trono de México Concert
events_to_add.description: Regional Mexican grupera music concert featuring El Trono de México
events_to_add.location: Palenque FENAPO, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Love of Lesbian Concert
events_to_add.description: Spanish indie pop/rock concert featuring Barcelona band Love of Lesbian
events_to_add.location: Teatro de la Paz, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Spring Equinox Celebrations
events_to_add.description: Various celebrations marking the arrival of spring, including flower exhibitions, traditional dances, music performances, and art installations throughout the city
events_to_add.location: Various parks and plazas, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Fiesta Vochera - Ciudad del Maíz
events_to_add.description: Exhibition of classic and customized Volkswagen Beetles with live music, food vendors, and family activities in the Pueblo Mágico of Ciudad del Maíz
events_to_add.location: Ciudad del Maíz, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Feria Nacional del Libro UASLP 2026 - 50th Edition
events_to_add.description: 50th anniversary edition of the National Book Fair organized by UASLP. Features 120+ publishing houses, book presentations, author signings, literary conferences, and workshops
events_to_add.location: Centro Cultural Universitario Bicentenario (CC200), UASLP

events_to_add.title: Feria Nacional de la Huasteca Potosina (FENAHUAP) 2026 - 64th Edition
events_to_add.description: 64th edition of the greatest Huasteca celebration. 10-day fair with free concerts at Teatro del Pueblo featuring Bronco, Ha*Ash, Espinoza Paz, Los Dos Carnales, and Matute. Gastronomy pavilion with zacahuil, bocoles, enchiladas huastecas, tamales de acuyo. Includes huapango music, artisan market, agricultural exhibition, folkloric dances, and tourism activities
events_to_add.location: Ciudad Valles, Huasteca Potosina, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Ed Maverick 'La Nube en el Jardín' Tour
events_to_add.description: Rising Mexican indie folk artist Ed Maverick performs at Teatro de la Paz as part of his 'La Nube en el Jardín' tour. Features special guest Edgar Bajo el Agua
events_to_add.location: Teatro de la Paz, Villerías 205, Centro Histórico, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Viernes de Dolores - Altares a la Virgen de los Dolores
events_to_add.description: Traditional Friday before Palm Sunday celebration featuring altars to the Virgin of Sorrows displayed throughout homes and businesses in Callejón del Buche and historic center
events_to_add.location: Callejón del Buche, Centro Histórico, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Festival del Cabrito 2026
events_to_add.description: First edition of this agro-gastronomic festival. Features cabrito al pastor, fried cabrito, machitos, regional mezcal and cheeses. Includes livestock talks, producer meetings, agricultural activities, and tours of Real de Catorce. Expected 8,000+ visitors
events_to_add.location: Real de Catorce / Estación Catorce, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Festival Internacional San Luis en Primavera 2026 - 5th Edition
events_to_add.description: Fifth edition of the city's premier spring cultural festival coinciding with Semana Santa. Over 80 events including concerts, exhibitions, gastronomic activities, wine and mezcal tastings, theater, and circus. Guest country: Spain. Guest state: Oaxaca. Opening concert by Miguel Bosé on March 28 at Plaza de los Fundadores. Free admission to most events
events_to_add.location: Plaza de Los Fundadores, Centro Histórico, and various venues, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Semana Santa - Palm Sunday Procession
events_to_add.description: Traditional Palm Sunday procession to the Cathedral for palm blessing, marking the beginning of Holy Week celebrations
events_to_add.location: Centro Histórico, Catedral Metropolitana, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: 31 Minutos 'Radio Guaripolo II' Tour
events_to_add.description: Beloved Chilean puppet show '31 Minutos' brings their 'Radio Guaripolo II' tour combining live music, humor, and the characteristic irreverent aesthetic. Fun for all ages
events_to_add.location: Teatro de la Paz, Villerías 205, Centro Histórico, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Procesión del Silencio
events_to_add.description: The second-largest Holy Week procession in the world after Seville, Spain. Declared Cultural Heritage of SLP. Over 2,500 participants from 30 cofradías march silently through the historic center carrying religious images. In 2026, includes a historic twinning ceremony with Seville's celebration. Approximately 100,000+ spectators attend
events_to_add.location: Centro Histórico - Templo del Carmen to Plaza de los Fundadores via San Agustín and San Francisco

events_to_add.title: Feria Nacional de la Enchilada (FENAE) 2026
events_to_add.description: Premier enchilada festival with 200+ years of tradition. Features 50+ exhibitors showcasing enchilada varieties from across Mexico. Muestra Gastronómica with traditional cooks, culinary contest (30,000+ peso prize). Concerts featuring Gloria Trevi, Horóscopos de Durango, and Bronco. Free mechanical rides, artisan market, and Carrera Atlética de la Enchilada (10km)
events_to_add.location: Plaza Principal, Soledad de Graciano Sánchez

events_to_add.title: Quema de Judas - Holy Saturday
events_to_add.description: Traditional 'Burning of Judas' celebration on Holy Saturday featuring the burning of Judas effigies, music, and community festivities
events_to_add.location: Plaza de Armas, Centro Histórico, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Copa Potosí de Futbol 2026
events_to_add.description: Major amateur soccer tournament with prize money exceeding 1 million pesos. Attracts former Liga MX players and international talent
events_to_add.location: Various venues, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Ill Niño Latin Metal Concert
events_to_add.description: American Latin metal band Ill Niño performs their heavy, groove-laden sound blending metal with Latin percussion. An intimate club show at Bunker 57
events_to_add.location: Bunker 57, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Festival Mexcal 2026
events_to_add.description: Major mezcal celebration featuring mezcals from various regions of Mexico, traditional gastronomy, live music, artisan vendors, and children's activities. Attracts 2,000-3,000 attendees
events_to_add.location: Ecomuseo del Parque Tangamanga I, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Caloncho Concert
events_to_add.description: Mexican indie pop artist Caloncho performs his fusion of pop, folk, reggae, and Latin elements at the historic Teatro de la Paz
events_to_add.location: Teatro de la Paz, Villerías 205, Centro Histórico, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Raúl Alcalá Challenge Gran Fondo
events_to_add.description: Major road cycling event named after Mexican cycling icon Raúl Alcalá. Part of SLP's positioning as a cycling destination
events_to_add.location: Parque de Morales, Delegación de Bocas, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: 6ta Carrera Atlética Juntos Avanzamos 2026
events_to_add.description: Important social-athletic event promoting disability inclusion. Features running distances with start/finish at Arena Potosí. Celebrates 30th anniversary of 'Juntos, una experiencia compartida A.C.'
events_to_add.location: Arena Potosí, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: YogArte Fest 2026
events_to_add.description: Wellness and arts festival combining yoga sessions, art exhibitions, live music, holistic workshops, and mindful activities
events_to_add.location: Centro Cultural Universitario Bicentenario, UASLP, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Día de la Santa Cruz
events_to_add.description: Traditional celebration honoring the Holy Cross and construction workers (Día del Albañil). Decorated crosses are placed on buildings under construction. Workers celebrate with food, music, and community gatherings. Colorful neighborhood celebrations throughout the city
events_to_add.location: Citywide - construction sites and neighborhoods, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Ricardo Montaner 'El Último Regreso' Tour
events_to_add.description: Venezuelan-Argentine pop icon Ricardo Montaner brings his farewell world tour to SLP, celebrating over four decades of music
events_to_add.location: Arena Potosí, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Gutalax Grindcore Concert
events_to_add.description: Grindcore and metal concert featuring Czech band Gutalax
events_to_add.location: Club Deportivo 2000, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: La Gira de Despedida del Hijo del Santo
events_to_add.description: Farewell wrestling tour of legendary Mexican luchador El Hijo del Santo. Major lucha libre event celebrating the career of a wrestling icon
events_to_add.location: Arena Potosí, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Banda MS 'Edición Limitada' Concert
events_to_add.description: Second date for Banda MS de Sergio Lizárraga in 2026. Part of their 'Edición Limitada MS' tour
events_to_add.location: Arena Potosí, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: San Luis Metal Fest 2026
events_to_add.description: International two-day metal festival 'The Awakening of Darkness'. Free entry with prior registration (capacity 30,000). Lineup includes Marduk, Metal Church, Possessed, Grave, Armored Saint, Sacrifice, Crimson Glory, Pestilence. VIP access for first 5,000 registrations. Includes metal merchandise pavilion, art exhibitions, and regional gastronomy
events_to_add.location: FENAPO grounds - Teatro del Pueblo, Palenque, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Serial Trail Mágico - Xilitla
events_to_add.description: Trail running race through the surrealist gardens and jungle landscape of Xilitla Pueblo Mágico. Features nocturnal and daytime races with 3K, 5K, 10K, and 21K distances
events_to_add.location: Xilitla, Huasteca Potosina, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Feria de Proveeduría - 3rd Edition
events_to_add.description: Government-organized supplier development fair focused on industrial development. Features speakers on innovation, technology, linkage, development, and competitiveness
events_to_add.location: Centro de Convenciones de San Luis Potosí, Blvd. Antonio Rocha Cordero 125

events_to_add.title: Festival Internacional del Vino 2026 - 14th Edition
events_to_add.description: Major enogastronomic event featuring 500+ wine labels from Mexico and internationally. Includes mezcal tasting zone, craft beer fest, premium wine tastings, Argentine asado dining, gastronomic zone with top SLP chefs, live music, and art exhibitions
events_to_add.location: Centro de las Artes de San Luis Potosí (CEART), Centro Histórico

events_to_add.title: Gasomax Trail 2026
events_to_add.description: Trail running race featuring scenic routes through the countryside of Santa María del Río with multiple distance categories
events_to_add.location: Complejo Deportivo Santa María del Río, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Corpus Christi
events_to_add.description: Annual Catholic celebration with processions through streets decorated with flower petals and sawdust carpets. Religious services and community activities across the state, particularly in the historic center barrios of San Sebastián and San Miguelito
events_to_add.location: Centro Histórico and barrios, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Infomatrix 2026 - Concurso Iberoamericano de Ciencia y Tecnología
events_to_add.description: International technology and innovation competition with young talents from 9 Iberoamerican countries and 26 Mexican states. Categories include robotics, digital animation, sustainability, app development, and AI. First time held in SLP
events_to_add.location: Tecnológico de Monterrey Campus San Luis Potosí - Arena Borregos

events_to_add.title: BMW Maratón Internacional Tangamanga 2026 - 40th Edition
events_to_add.description: One of Mexico's oldest road running events (since 1983), AIMS member and Boston Marathon qualifier. Features 5K, 10K, 21K, and 42K distances. Flat route at 1,860m altitude through Tangamanga I Park, Centro Histórico, and Tangamanga II
events_to_add.location: Parque Tangamanga I & II, Centro Histórico, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Hobby Salsa Fest 2026
events_to_add.description: Salsa and Latin dance festival featuring workshops, performances, social dancing, and competitions
events_to_add.location: San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Serial Trail Mágico - Aquismón
events_to_add.description: Trail running race through the natural landscapes near Aquismón featuring waterfalls and Huasteca scenery
events_to_add.location: Aquismón, Huasteca Potosina, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Feria Regional del Rebozo 2026
events_to_add.description: Annual celebration in the 'Cradle of the Rebozo.' Features artisanal fashion shows, rebozo exhibitions (classic and contemporary), workshops on natural dyeing and traditional weaving, tours of artisan workshops, coronation of the Rebozo Queen, concerts, popular dances, and traditional potosina cuisine
events_to_add.location: Santa María del Río, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Festival de la Huasteca 2026
events_to_add.description: Cultural festival celebrating the Huasteca region's indigenous heritage through traditional music including huapango, dance, gastronomy, and crafts
events_to_add.location: Various municipalities in the Huasteca Potosina

events_to_add.title: FENAPO 2026 - Feria Nacional Potosina
events_to_add.description: The largest annual celebration in SLP and one of Mexico's most important fairs with 83+ years of tradition. Features free concerts at Teatro del Pueblo (Sin Bandera, Los Acosta confirmed), Palenque shows (Grupo Firme, Gloria Trevi confirmed), gastronomy pavilion, Pabellón Industrial, amusement rides, artisan crafts, agricultural exposition, and entertainment. Attracts 9+ million visitors over approximately 24 days
events_to_add.location: Recinto Ferial FENAPO, Av. Francisco Martínez de la Vega 255, Col. Tepeyac

events_to_add.title: Copa Kama's de Futbol - FENAPO
events_to_add.description: Youth soccer tournament during FENAPO (Feria Nacional Potosina)
events_to_add.location: Unidad Deportiva Adolfo López Mateos, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Copa Maxibasquet Potosí - FENAPO
events_to_add.description: Veterans basketball tournament for 35+ age categories during FENAPO
events_to_add.location: CEDETAR and Auditorio de la Renovación Moral, Parque Tangamanga II

events_to_add.title: Fiesta de la Virgen de la Asunción - Santa María del Río
events_to_add.description: Colorful celebration honoring the Virgin of the Assumption in the famous silk rebozo-producing town. Features religious processions, traditional dances, artisan displays, and regional cuisine
events_to_add.location: Santa María del Río, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Ciclista San Luis Rey - FENAPO
events_to_add.description: Annual cycling event held in Tangamanga Park as part of FENAPO sports events
events_to_add.location: Parque Tangamanga I, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Torneo de Voleibol FENAPO-INPODE
events_to_add.description: Volleyball tournament during the National Fair organized by INPODE
events_to_add.location: CEDETAR, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Fiesta Patronal de San Luis Rey de Francia
events_to_add.description: Patron saint festival of San Luis Potosí commemorating the city's founding in 1592. Nine-day novena leading up to August 25. Includes liturgical acts, processions, Matachines dances, fireworks, and cultural events coinciding with central days of FENAPO
events_to_add.location: Centro Histórico, Catedral Metropolitana, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Grand Prix de Atletismo FENAPO
events_to_add.description: Track and field athletics competition during FENAPO featuring local, state, and regional athletes
events_to_add.location: CEDETAR, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Copa Tigre de Taekwondo - FENAPO
events_to_add.description: Martial arts taekwondo tournament during FENAPO. SLP is known as a national taekwondo power
events_to_add.location: CEDETAR, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Fiestas Patrias - Grito de Independencia
events_to_add.description: Mexico's Independence celebrations. September 15: Noche Mexicana at Plaza de Armas with live music, artisanal markets, kermeses, and the traditional Grito de Independencia by the Governor. September 16: Civic-Military Parade with 4,000+ participants. City decorated in green, white, and red. Free concerts and gastronomic festivals throughout the period
events_to_add.location: Plaza de Armas, Centro Histórico, and citywide, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Fiesta de San Miguel Arcángel
events_to_add.description: Patronal celebration in Barrio de San Miguelito and Mexquitic de Carmona. Nine-day novena with processions, masses, traditional dances, and community festivities
events_to_add.location: Barrio de San Miguelito, San Luis Potosí; Mexquitic de Carmona

events_to_add.title: Oktobeerfest / Global Beer Fest 2026
events_to_add.description: Largest craft beer festival in SLP since 2017. Features 50+ craft beer labels, mixology, gastronomic pavilion, artisan market, two music stages, comedy shows, and children's play area
events_to_add.location: Ecomuseo del Parque Tangamanga I, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Medio Maratón UASLP 2026 - 42nd Edition
events_to_add.description: SLP's largest and most traditional running race with 40+ years of history. World Athletics and FMAA certified. Features 21K, 10K, and 5K distances. Draws 12,500-17,000+ participants
events_to_add.location: UASLP Edificio Central, Centro Histórico, Tangamanga I Park

events_to_add.title: Fiesta de San Francisco de Asís - Real de Catorce
events_to_add.description: One of the most important pilgrimages in Mexico. Devotees venerate 'Panchito' in this historic mining town Pueblo Mágico. Features processions, traditional dances, a week-long fair, and religious ceremonies. Approximately 100,000+ pilgrims attend
events_to_add.location: Real de Catorce, Parroquia de la Inmaculada Concepción

events_to_add.title: Centro de las Artes - Museo Leonora Carrington
events_to_add.description: Ongoing exhibitions at the first museum in the world dedicated to surrealist artist Leonora Carrington, featuring 100+ works. Located in the historic former penitentiary converted to arts center
events_to_add.location: Centro de las Artes de San Luis Potosí, Calzada de Guadalupe 705

events_to_add.title: Teatro de la Paz Cultural Programming
events_to_add.description: Ongoing cultural programming at one of Mexico's four principal historic theaters (built 1889-1894). Hosts opera, theater, dance, concerts, and cultural events throughout the year
events_to_add.location: Teatro de la Paz, Villerías 105, Plaza del Carmen, Centro Histórico

events_to_add.title: Alan Parsons Live Project 'The Show Must Go On'
events_to_add.description: Progressive rock concert featuring legendary musician Alan Parsons. Originally scheduled for February 6, postponed to autumn 2026 due to back injury. New date TBD
events_to_add.location: Teatro de la Ciudad del Parque Tangamanga II, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Liga MX Clausura 2026 - Atlético de San Luis Home Games
events_to_add.description: Professional first-division Mexican soccer matches. Atlético de San Luis plays approximately 8-9 home games during the Clausura tournament season
events_to_add.location: Estadio Alfonso Lastras, San Luis Potosí

events_to_add.title: Liga MX Apertura 2026 - Atlético de San Luis Home Games
events_to_add.description: Professional first-division Mexican soccer matches. Atlético de San Luis home games during the Apertura tournament season from July through November
events_to_add.location: Estadio Alfonso Lastras, San Luis Potosí
